{{Infobox location
| name = Violet District
| introduced = tg-03-city-of-light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet District]] is a district where the inhabitants follow the '[[Violet]] way' of honesty at all times.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] stands at the center of the [[Violet District]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet District]] is home to the Thrulls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Violet District]] is a location in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"Alin stood at the center of the Violet District."<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Settlements]]
